strategy: LH-001 Lifecycle Heuristic — Single-Event Geopolitics Insider Detection
reason: Statistical signal confirmed but fragile. Haley market: p=0.0000 (highly significant, n=36 clean candidates). Iran market: p=0.1829 (not independently significant). Combined: p=0.0180 (one-tailed Mann-Whitney), not matching claimed p=0.0067. Effect size small (rank-biserial r=0.14). N=2 events is insufficient for cross-event generalisation. Appropriate as watchlist trigger, not standalone trading signal.

caveats: Control group lacks profit filter creating asymmetric comparison vs pre-registration
Fair comparison (both groups profit>=1000) gives p=0.0117 — still significant

task4_iran_market.combined_p_without_iran_change: Signal is STRONGER without Iran (0.0000 vs 0.0180)
task4_iran_market.title_anomaly: Will Iran recognize Iran by June 2025 — self-referential, impossible title
task4_iran_market.elo_clustering_concern: Multiple Iran candidates at ELO 3000.0, 2700.0, 2000.0 — round-number clustering

task5_prospective_applicability.existing_pattern_label: New wallet, large high-price bet, single market focus (Iran-strike pattern)
task5_prospective_applicability.deployment_recommendation: watchlist trigger only, not position-sizing signal

conditions_for_full_pass: Iran market title resolved via API
